creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
Created attachment 217365
update to 1.10.0

Also updated depends.

Changelog:
- Add maxmemory_policy and memory reservation metrics (thx @jon-walton )
- Add TLS support to exporter (thx @schaefec )
- Allow passing Root CA Cert file for TLS connections (thx @SarjakSShah )
- Add support for Redis 6 username auth (thx @k3a )
- Fix missing labels for some replication metrics (thx @yz1509 )
